OpenApiInfo.Description:
This is a template for creating .NET back-end solutions
using a 3-layer architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) pattern.
The template is built with Visual Studio and targets .NET 8.
OpenApiInfo.Title: Paradise Api

OpenApiSecurityScheme.Description: The authorization header is expected to contain the Bearer token (a JWT prefixed with 'Bearer ').
OpenApiSecurityScheme.Name: Authorization
